title: Oil jumps as Trump warns 'Clock is Ticking' for Iran, fanning fears of escalation in conflict
summary_full: Trump's warning to Iran over the weekend signals that the impasse between Washington and Tehran over ending the war could deteriorate into resumption of armed conflict.
summary_public: Trump's warning to Iran over the weekend signals that the impasse between Washington and Tehran over ending the war could deteriorate into resumption of armed conflict.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: fanning fears of escalation in conflict
